error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Please check the URL.

wan_port_disconnect.title: WAN External Port Disconnected
wan_port_disconnect.message: The WAN port external Internet cable of the ipTIME router ({url}) is unplugged or the modem connection is lost. Please check the physical cable status.

wan_port_connect.title: WAN External Port Connected
wan_port_connect.message: The WAN port external Internet cable of the ipTIME router ({url}) has been successfully reconnected.

wan_ip_disconnect.title: Internet Connection Lost Warning
wan_ip_disconnect.message: The ipTIME router ({url}) failed to obtain a public IP, and external Internet communication has been disconnected. Please check your ISP modem.

wan_ip_connect.title: Internet Connection Restored
wan_ip_connect.message: The ipTIME router ({url}) has successfully obtained the public IP (**{ip}**) and the Internet connection is restored.

wan_ip_change.title: Public IP Address Changed
wan_ip_change.message:
The public IP address of the ipTIME router ({url}) has changed.

* **Previous IP Address:** `{old_ip}`
* **New IP Address:** `{new_ip}`

geoip_off.title: GeoIP Feature Disabled Warning
geoip_off.message: The GeoIP foreign IP blocking security feature of the ipTIME router ({url}) is turned off. If this is unintended, your network might be exposed to random attacks from abroad. Please verify your settings.

portforward_on.title: Port Forwarding Enabled
portforward_on.message: The Port Forwarding feature of the ipTIME router ({url}) has been turned On. Specific local ports will be exposed to the external Internet according to your active forwarding rules.

portforward_off.title: Port Forwarding Disabled
portforward_off.message: The Port Forwarding feature of the ipTIME router ({url}) has been turned Off. All external port open rules are temporarily blocked.

wifi_off.title: Wi-Fi Network Off Warning ({ssid})
wifi_off.message: The wireless network **{ssid}** ({band} band) of the ipTIME router ({url}) has been disabled. All wireless IoT smart devices mapped to this band may lose connection.

acl_on.title: Remote Web Management (Access List) Enabled Warning
acl_on.message: The external remote web management (Access List) access port of the ipTIME router ({url}) is now open and active. Your network is exposed to external hack attempts. Please ensure your administrator password is extremely secure.

acl_off.title: Remote Web Management (Access List) Closed
acl_off.message: The external remote web management access port of the ipTIME router ({url}) has been securely closed and blocked. The router is now safely isolated from external intrusion attempts.

csrf_disabled_danger.title: 🔴 CSRF Prevention Disabled Warning (Remote Management Active)
csrf_disabled_danger.message: **[CRITICAL SECURITY RISK]** While remote web management is active on the ipTIME router ({url}), the **CSRF Prevention option has been turned Off**. Your network is highly vulnerable to remote browser hijacking and cross-site phishing attacks. Please re-enable CSRF Protection immediately.

csrf_security_on.title: CSRF Phishing Defense Enabled
csrf_security_on.message: The web CSRF cross-site request forgery defense option of the ipTIME router ({url}) is now active. Even with the remote web management port open, a double-security barrier against external malicious intrusion is maintained.

security_csrf_off.name: CSRF Prevention
security_csrf_off.description: Blocks cross-site request forgery attacks where a user visiting a malicious external site while logged in could have their router settings unauthorizedly altered.
security_csrf_off.danger: When disabled, visiting a forged website or clicking a malicious ad can lead to administrative credential theft or DNS manipulation.

security_arp_virus_off.name: ARP Virus Protection
security_arp_virus_off.description: Detects and blocks ARP Spoofing and malicious traffic attempting to spoof the MAC addresses of other local network devices.
security_arp_virus_off.danger: When disabled, if an infected device exists on the local network, sensitive personal information and financial data packets might be easily intercepted (sniffed).

security_syn_flood_off.name: SYN Flood Protection
security_syn_flood_off.description: Defends against Denial of Service (DoS) attacks that attempt to crash the router's resources by flooding it with high volumes of TCP SYN packets.
security_syn_flood_off.danger: When disabled, abnormal incoming traffic floods can overload the router processor, causing internet drops or severe speed degradation.

security_smurf_off.name: Smurf DDoS Protection
security_smurf_off.description: Prevents Smurf Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks that spoof the router's IP to flood the network bandwidth with ICMP Echo packets.
security_smurf_off.danger: When disabled, high-volume traffic bombs from external or compromised local devices can directly crash the router.

security_ip_source_routing_off.name: IP Source Routing Block
security_ip_source_routing_off.description: Prevents packets from specifying their routing path manually to bypass security firewalls or intrusion detection systems.
security_ip_source_routing_off.danger: When disabled, attackers can manipulate routing sources to bypass firewall controls and scan internal network routes.

security_ip_spoofing_off.name: IP Spoofing Protection
security_ip_spoofing_off.description: Rejects rogue incoming packets that fake their source IP address as local internal IPs to bypass firewall filtering.
security_ip_spoofing_off.danger: When disabled, external hackers can spoof internal trusted IP addresses to bypass security checks and control the router.

security_inbound_ping_off.name: Block Inbound Ping
security_inbound_ping_off.description: Blocks external ICMP Ping (Echo Request) packets to make the router completely invisible to automated hackers scanning for active IPs.
security_inbound_ping_off.danger: When disabled, your active presence online is exposed, making the router a direct target for DDoS or port-level intrusion attacks.

security_outbound_ping_off.name: Block Outbound Ping
security_outbound_ping_off.description: Restricts internal devices from sending outbound Ping (ICMP) packets to external servers.
security_outbound_ping_off.danger: When disabled, malicious code running locally can easily contact external Command and Control (C&C) servers or leak outbound port scans.
